title: HEALLILY Heart Oasis Florist Foam: Green Artificial Floral Foam Block Mud with Suction Cup for Wet Flower Arranging Diy Car Wedding Decoration 12.6 X 11.8 X 1.6 Inches
features: Lightweight & Compact Design - Ideal for Versatile Uses ：Embrace the miniature elegance of our Heart floral foam (Size: 32X30X3CM), which is both lightweight and portable. Create charming mini bonsais to adorn your wedding car, office desk, or dining table. Each foam block offers a random color and style, ensuring a unique touch in every arrange

Innovative & Convenient Installation ：Our foam flower brick boasts a suction cup design, providing easy installation and use. Fix the foam with bouquets anywhere, on any smooth surface, while enjoying its sturdiness and durability.

Premium -Quality Material for Optimal Flower Health ：Crafted from premium Plastic + PP, our flower arrangement kit ensures fast saturation and water absorption. It caters perfectly to both wet and dried floral arrangements, keeping fresh flowers vibrant for an extended period.

Floral Foam for Enchanting Flower Arrangements ：Designed especially for wedding flowers decoration, our florist foam keeps fresh flowers lively and fresh for longer durations. Whether for home or shop, this foam is ideal for nurturing those delicate blossoms.

Multifaceted Decorative Options ：Elevate the aesthetic appeal at various events such as wedding aisles, table centerpieces, house decorations, florist supplies, meeting sites, and more. Our floral sponge blocks for wedding bouquets are excellent for adding a unique decorative touch to any special occasion.
description: Product Description Unleash Your Creativity with HEALLILY Floral Foam Bricks! Create Stunning Flower Arrangements with Ease! Easy to Install - Suction Cup Design! Versatile Floral Decorations for Every Occasion! Perfect for Weddings, Birthdays, Proms and More! Make Beautiful Arrangements a Breeze! Lightweight and Leak-Proof for Optimal Flower Care! Wheels of Romance Dress your wedding car with elegance using HEALLILY Floral Foam Bricks. Create a breathtaking floral entrance for your big day! Floral Magic The Versatile Florist's Choice Flower Freedom – Whether it’s roses or daisies, lilies or orchids, HEALLILY Floral Foam Blocks let your creativity bloom with all your favorite flowers. Any Bloom, Any Time Design Without Limits – Let no flower go unnoticed. With HEALLILY Floral Foam Bricks, every petal tells a story in your arrangements. A Wedding Like No Other！ With HEALLILY Floral Foam Bricks, create one-of-a-kind floral arrangements to make your special day truly unforgettable. Uniquely You – Your wedding should be as unique as your love. HEALLILY Floral Foam Bricks help you create distinctive decorations that reflect your personal style. Personalize Your Party – Use HEALLILY Floral Foam Blocks to add a touch of individuality to every floral detail, ensuring an exceptional and personalized wedding experience. Design Your Dream Wedding – Transform your vision into reality with HEALLILY Floral Foam Bricks, allowing you to customize every flower arrangement for a dreamy celebration. Your Style, Your Wedding – With HEALLILY Floral Foam Bricks, express your unique taste through every petal and create a wedding that’s perfectly you. An Unforgettable Affair – Make your wedding day extraordinary with HEALLILY Floral Foam Bricks, crafting signature floral designs that will be remembered forever. Unleash Your Creativity - Decorate Every Occasion with HEALLILY! Cherish every moment with the freedom to design breathtaking floral decorations for any event. With HEALLILY Floral Foam Bricks, you hold the power to customize your celebrations, turning ordinary days into extraordinary affairs. Whether it's a wedding car adorned with love, a birthday party splashed with joy, a stage spectacle bursting with drama, or a simple get-together blooming with warmth, HEALLILY Floral Foam Bricks are your perfect partner. Easy to use and endlessly versatile, they invite you to unleash your creativity and DIY your way into a world where every occasion is beautifully decorated with your personal touch. Let your imagination run wild and create floral masterpieces that will undoubtedly leave a lasting impression on all who attend. With HEALLILY, your flowers and your occasions don't just come alive—they blossom into unforgettable experiences. Easy Creations, Lasting Impressions With HEALLILY Floral Foam Bricks, effortlessly craft intricate floral designs that leave a lasting impression without the weight. The Lightness of Floral Art – Create breathtaking blooms anywhere, anytime with HEALLILY Floral Foam Bricks. Their lightness ensures ease of use, making every setup as simple as can be.
